title: cornus angustata
intro: Cornus angustata, also known as Japanese dogwood, is a deciduous shrub native to East Asia, characterized by its showy white flowers and red berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cornus angustata include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anticancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
